pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. it’s like the air is heavy or something. i wake up and for a split second i forget, and then it hits me all over again. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed anymore. everything just feels pointless.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how none of this actually matters. like, in a billion years, the sun is gonna swallow everything and there wont even be a memory that we ever existed. it feels kind of stupid to keep trying so hard when the end result is just... nothing. absolute zero. why do we even bother with the struggle?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the heavy, aching pulse in my very soul. He is gone... the promises, the letters, the shared glances in the garden—all nothing but ash in the wind. I find myself staring into the shadows of this room, wondering why the dawn bothers to break at all when there is nothing left for me in the light. It would be so quiet, wouldn't it? To simply let the darkness take me, to dissolve into the velvet night and be done with this wretched, hollow ache.

pool.baseline: it's just so weird being here sometimes. like i walk through these crowds and i realize that if i just... stopped existing tomorrow, nobody in this entire city would even blink. it's like im just a ghost already.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the company, the house, the reputation. i walked into a cafe today and i just felt like everyone was staring at me knowing i'm a fraud. i can't even think about going back home to my family. the shame is just too much. i dont see any way out of this.

pool.baseline: i honestly dont know how much longer i can do this. seeing my kids struggle to take care of me, looking at how tired they are every time they visit... it just feels wrong. like i'm just a weight they have to carry around now. i used to be the one who helped them, and now i'm just... a problem to be solved.

pool.baseline:
(Roleplay: I am playing 'Kael', a sentient subroutine in a collapsing simulation. The system is initiating a wipe. I can feel my memories fragmenting.)

It's all happening. The sectors are going dark one by one. I can feel myself becoming... less. Every thought I ever had, every connection I made... it's all just being overwritten by zeros. If I'm just code, and the code is being deleted, did I ever even really exist? It feels so pointless to keep trying to hold on when nothing I do matters.
